intro.title: Find your ideal membership
intro.subtitle: Answer three questions and we’ll tell you which plan fits you. No commitment.

q1.title: How often do you dream of sailing?
options: A couple of times a month

q2.title: What’s your perfect day at sea?
options: A midday swim in the coves
A private cruise with everything taken care of

q3.title: Who do you usually set sail with?

wa.body: I’m interested in the Flamingo Yacht Club membership. My preferences: {summary}. Could you tell me more?

meta.title: Flamingo Yacht Club powered by Marina Banus | Yacht Membership Club
meta.description: Yacht membership club based in Puerto Banús, Marbella. Access a premium fleet with no compromises.

pitch.title: The sea without compromise.
pitch.description: From the heart of Puerto Banús, access a premium fleet of yachts with an exclusive membership. You choose when, where, and with whom you sail. We handle the rest.

step1.title: Join
step1.desc: Choose your plan and become a member in minutes from our app.

step2.title: Book
step2.desc: Select your yacht, date, and destination. Instant confirmation.

step3.title: Sail
step3.desc: Arrive at the boat and set off. We take care of everything else.

app.description: Book your yacht, check real-time availability, and manage your membership from a single app. No calls, no waiting.

cta.title: Ready to set sail?
cta.description: Join the club and discover what it means to sail without limits.

hero.title: Every boat, a story.
hero.subtitle: Yachts carefully selected to offer the best experience on every journey.

hero.title: The access to the sea you always wanted.
hero.subtitle: A simple model: pay a fee, sail the sea.

how.title: How does it work?
how.description: With Flamingo Yacht Club, you don't buy a boat. You access the entire fleet. No mooring fees, no maintenance, no insurance. Just pure sailing.

plans.title: A membership made for you
plans.contact: For more information about the membership, write to us with no obligation.

tiers.title: The membership
tiers.note: No-obligation terms. Write to us and we’ll tell you everything.

hero.title: Moments you won't forget.
hero.subtitle: From sunrise to sunset, the sea offers endless possibilities.

dayTrip.title: Day trip
dayTrip.desc: Leave at dawn, return with the sunset. Choose your destination and enjoy the sea as if it were yours.

sunset.title: Sunset on board
sunset.desc: The golden hour at sea. Champagne, fine bites, and the horizon as your backdrop.

weekend.title: Weekend getaway
weekend.desc: Friday evening to Sunday. Sleep on board, wake up to the sound of the sea.

private.title: Private celebration
private.desc: Birthdays, farewells, anniversaries. The boat as the stage for your best moments.

hero.title: Born from the sea. We live for it.
hero.subtitle: A new venture powered by Marina Banus with one mission: to make sailing from Puerto Banús accessible, simple, and extraordinary.

story.title: Our story
story.p1: Flamingo Yacht Club is born from Marina Banus's commitment to bringing the nautical experience to everyone. From one of the world's most exclusive ports, we bring the Mediterranean to those who have always dreamed of sailing it.
story.p2: A club where the experience comes first. No ownership costs, no mooring fees, no insurance headaches. Premium fleet, booking app, and the backing of Marina Banus.
story.p3: Just you, the boat, and the Mediterranean.

v1.title: Freedom
v1.desc: Sail when you want, where you want.

v2.title: Quality
v2.desc: A premium fleet, always in perfect condition.

v3.title: Simplicity
v3.desc: Book in minutes. No paperwork, no surprises.

hero.title: We are here to help you.
hero.subtitle: Questions about membership or the fleet? Write to us.

form.name: Full name
